c.d: Number of active users on the platform. A larger user base increases the likelihood of connecting with more friends.
c.s: Sensor Tower, AgileTech Vietnam, Hootsuite Blog

c.d: Ability to share photos, videos, and other media types, enhancing communication and engagement.
Features that facilitate group chats and calls, making it easier to connect with multiple friends simultaneously.
Availability of video call functionality for face-to-face interactions.
Compatibility with multiple operating systems and devices, ensuring accessibility for all users.
Security features such as end-to-end encryption to protect user data and conversations.
Special functionalities like games, screen sharing, or location sharing that enhance the user experience.
c.s: The Sociable, Symptoms of Living, Beyond Instagram & Snapchat
